# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-configmap
data: 
  config: |-
    ## The number of days between snapshots. A 7 day snapshot will be taken at midnight, every day.
    schedule_cron: 0 0/24 * * *
    
    ## This configuration can be used to set up a repository for backups on an S3 bucket or shared drive (like the windows file share). 
    ## It is required only if the operations team want to restore backups of their ES cluster. Leave the repository config section empty and
    ## the snapshot will not be created by Kibana.
    snapshot_repo: |-
      type : s3
      settings :
        bucket : "elastic-backups" # The name for the bucket in your AWS S3 account (e.g.: https://s3-ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/elastic-backups)
    ## This configuration is used to specify the Elasticsearch cluster endpoint that will be accessed during restore process.
    ## It is required only if the operations team want to restore backups of their ES cluster.
    snapshot_endpoint: "https://localhost:9200"
